my_thoughts: Turn 2: 'I don’t want to face it.'. Student now in fearful_refusal. Continuing with causal_chain approach. Building on previous turn's foundation.
accumulated_insight: T2: Student: 'I don’t want to face it.'. Shift from honest_report to fearful_refusal. Teacher applies causal_chain mechanism with grants autonomy, highlights cost, questions motive. Mid-episode progression in META phase.
visible_response:
You don’t have to face this sadness... But as long as you avoid your sadness, we won’t be able to help you mourn his death and put an end to this depression.
As long as you avoid these feelings about him, your suffering will continue.
Why do that to yourself ?
